resources.string: Go to Settings to scan local directories and add music
Tap the settings button to configure WebDAV connection
Manual track changes, play/pause/stop fades, and seek fades
fade transition crossfade seek pause stop track change
Choose how previous, next, and tapped tracks switch while music is playing.
Switch tracks immediately. Use this for the lowest latency or strict bit-perfect tests.
Fade the current track down first, then start the next track with a short fade-in.
Overlap the current and next track when their decoded output format is compatible.
Used by short manual fade-out and manual crossfade. Default is 400 ms.
Smooth the start and end of user playback actions.
Apply fade-in on play/resume and fade-out before pause or stop.
Length for play, pause, and stop fades. Default is 400 ms.
Reduce clicks and current noise when dragging the playback position.
Fade out before seeking, clear old buffered audio, then fade back in after the new position starts.
Shorter than transport fades so scrubbing still feels responsive. Default is 100 ms.
Sample rate, bit depth, output mode, and resampling
sample rate bit depth output mode resampling
USB exclusive mode, DAC status, PCM output, and DSD
USB exclusive DAC PCM DSD decoder
EQ, spatial effects, dynamics, and frequency enhancement
Default background, immersive mode, persistent cover, and visualization
Theme mode, colors, and display style
Lyric sources, lyric font settings, and lyric display
Flyme, Samsung, Bluetooth, and Lyric Getter
Font size, weight, italic style, and global display
Quality, high-resolution covers, 24-bit RGB, downloads, and animation
cover cache high resolution album art
Back up and restore playlists, statistics, and app configuration
Version, core features, project page, and open-source components
Music folders, rescans, short-track filtering, play counts, and progress restore
scan folder rescan short track play count progress
Use 32-bit color depth (24-bit RGB + alpha) for best quality, with roughly double memory usage. Disable on low-memory devices (<128 MB).
Double the decode target size so covers look sharper on the playback screen.
Load an impulse response for correction, room, or spatial effects
The native DSP engine is unavailable
IR loading failed; expand for details
IR decoded; waiting for the playback DSP engine
Select a mono or stereo PCM/Float WAV file
Level of the original unprocessed signal
Output gain applied to the convolved path; start around −6 dB
Delays only the wet path; useful for room and reverb IRs
Unable to load this impulse response
Filters, preamp, AutoEQ, and frequency response curve
10–40 fixed-frequency slider EQ with built-in presets
Threshold, ratio, attack, release, and makeup gain
Low shelf, high shelf, and crossover frequency
Horizontal binaural rendering, intensity, and rotation speed
3D direction, elevation, reflections, and spatial reverb
Light mode uses white background with black text; dark mode uses pure black background with white text.
Show album-art background on the playback screen
Show audio spectrum animation at the bottom of the playback screen
Show album art in the main-screen capsule bar
Restore the last playback screen when reopening the app
Tap to choose a system font
%1$s · Install the Lyricon provider service to connect
Font, weight, scale, and display style
Push lyrics through the Flyme system status bar
Push lyrics to other apps through Lyric Getter
Push lyrics to car systems over Bluetooth
Back up playlists and listening statistics to a WebDAV server, or restore them on another device.
⚠ WebDAV is not configured. Configure the connection from the WebDAV entry in the sidebar first.
Automatically adjusts playback loudness from song loudness metadata for more consistent perceived volume.
Switch directly to the next track with no gap at the end of the song.
For car Bluetooth devices that only support call protocols (HFP/HSP)
SCO call-channel bandwidth is limited. Downsampling improves compatibility but reduces quality.

Automatically adjusts playback gain from embedded loudness metadata (ReplayGain), making songs with different mastering loudness sound more consistent. Based on the ITU-R BS.1770 loudness normalization standard.

When the current song ends, switch directly to the next song decoder stream to remove the short silent gap commonly heard between tracks.
Useful for live albums, DJ mixes, and other continuous playback.

Starts the next song before the current one ends and overlaps both audio streams. A constant-power curve keeps the transition natural.
The overlap can be set from 1 to 12 seconds; 0 means off.

Bluetooth SCO (Synchronous Connection Oriented) call-channel bandwidth is limited and usually supports only 8 kHz or 16 kHz.
When enabled, audio is resampled to 16 kHz before output. This improves compatibility with car devices but noticeably reduces quality, similar to a phone call.
When disabled, the system tries to output at the original sample rate; some devices may fail to play correctly.
The preset has been generated. Copy the JSON below:
This preset has %1$d bands. The current EQ has %2$d bands.
Keep the current band count and convert intelligently, or switch to the preset band count.
Imported and adapted to current %1$d bands
Search headphone models to download AutoEq presets
Imported AutoEq: %1$s %2$d filters → current %3$d bands, Preamp %4$s
The playback DSP controller is not connected yet.
Sharper low/mid attacks, brief body collection and a quick rebound.
Stronger body, audible bass harmonics and sustained parallel density.
Keeps bass and vocals stable while opening the mid/high stereo field.
Expands the mid/high side channel, centers low frequencies and limits excessive side energy for a wider but stable speaker image.
Adds stronger low/mid body, bass harmonics and parallel density for a fuller, more energetic presentation while preserving peak control.
Scales body, harmonics, density and presence together without changing their individual limits.
Maximum parallel lift for the body band. Dense low/mid material automatically receives less.
Adds upper harmonics from the body band so small speakers suggest deeper bass without forcing sub-bass.
Adds a small 1.8–6.5 kHz parallel band so the thicker sound does not become dull.
Removes movement noise and very low content that compact speakers cannot reproduce efficiently.
Sets how far the fullness band extends into the low mids.
Lower values feed more of the signal into the parallel compressor.
Higher values make the parallel branch denser; 1:1 disables compression.
Slower values preserve the original hit; faster values thicken the body sooner.
Controls how long the added density lasts. Too long can cause pumping.
Blends the compressed branch with the original signal instead of replacing it.
Gain applied only to the compressed branch, not to the full output.
All powerful-mode branches are scaled together when the predicted peak approaches this level.
Scales width, decorrelation and low-frequency centering together.
Maximum gain added to the mid/high side channel.
Frequencies above this point receive the main stereo expansion.
Adds a light phase variation to the expanded side band without changing the mono sum.
Reduces low-frequency side energy to keep bass weight stable between the speakers.
Automatically reduces extra width when side energy begins to dominate vocals and centered instruments.
Expansion is reduced when the predicted stereo peak approaches this level.
Extracts low/mid attacks in parallel, briefly collects the musical body and releases it quickly for clearer impact and rebound.
Scales the detected transient lift without changing the configured maximum.
Upper bound for the parallel attack-band impact without continuously raising the full-band output.
Combined impact hold, body collection and recovery speed. Shorter feels tighter; longer feels fuller.
Rejects sub-bass and movement noise before transient detection.
Sets the highest frequency used to identify kick/snare body.
Higher values react to smaller attack changes; maximum gain is unchanged.
Signals below this dBFS level cannot trigger the enhancement.
How quickly the detector captures the leading edge.
How long the attack detector remains elevated.
Tracks the musical body and must remain slower than the fast envelope.
Controls how steadily the detector follows sustained low/mid energy.
How quickly the actual lift reaches its target. Shorter sounds harder.
Requested lift is reduced when recent peaks approach this dBFS level.
3D spherical binaural rendering · full diffusion · pinna EQ + early reflections + FDN reverb
Spreads audio in all directions to simulate an enveloping real-space sound field. Turn it on to experience immersive panoramic sound without manually setting a direction.
Continuously increases the left-right difference. 0% preserves the source and 100% expands Side to 3×, with linked stereo peak control to keep the image stable.
Keeps crossfeed from making bass muddy.
Limits the crossfeed band to a natural speaker-like range.
How much of the opposite channel is blended in.
Keep the source format and bypass resampling and software processing.
Allow resampling, volume control, and format adaptation.
Choose the output bit depth according to DAC capability.
Convert regular PCM to DSD in real time. Bit-perfect mode will be disabled when enabled.
Add triangular dither to PCM→DSD modulation. Disable it for high DSD rates or slower devices.

PCM mode decodes DSD source files to PCM output. When PCM→DSD is enabled, DoP or Native DSD transport is used. If capability scanning is incomplete, RawSMusic will still allow a trial and fall back when native initialization fails.
Force each USB write to contain only one packet.
Enable only when audio dropouts occur, even with a large buffer.
May cause failures. Do not enable unless troubleshooting.
May help when diagnostics show the stream interface was returned to Alt 0.
Export playback logs and send feedback by email
Collects playback logs and prepares an email to 3091734331@qq.com.
Volume will be fixed at maximum and cannot be adjusted. Confirm that your headphones, amplifier, and DAC are at safe levels first.
Highlight detected climax only when waveform style is enabled.
Show a live color preview for the waveform palette.
选择要扫描的本地音乐目录
还没有可扫描的文件夹
这个文件夹无法转换为本地路径，当前扫描链路暂不接入纯 SAF URI
请至少选择一个文件夹
已保存 %1$d 个文件夹，开始扫描
System mixer · High compatibility · PCM ≤ 48kHz / 24bit / Stereo
personalization predictive back animation gesture motion
Preview the destination while swiping back
Disable liquid-glass refraction and use Gaussian blur to reduce GPU load.
Delete this playlist? This action cannot be undone.
Imported %1$d songs; %2$d entries were not found
No matching songs were found in this playlist file
A playlist with this name already exists
This playlist is empty. Add songs from a song menu.
Scan complete: no changes, %1$d tracks total, %2$.1f s
Scan complete: %1$d added, %2$d updated, %3$d removed; %4$d unchanged, %5$d total, %6$.1f s
点击链接加入群聊【RawS Music交流群】：https://qm.qq.com/q/bOvqTQPABi

string-array.name: update_notes
string-array.item: Fixed crashes caused by some options in the audio-effects screen opened from the player.
Fixed lyric lag in streaming playback caused by rounding differences between wall-clock and actual positions.
Fixed progress display mismatching natural playback position.
Fixed UI and audio mismatching after shuffle track changes in the standard player.
Fixed Previous restarting the current track after seeking.
Fixed status-bar lyric artwork mismatching the current track.
Fixed default artwork not appearing in the player when a track has no artwork.
Fixed global font settings not taking effect.
Fixed default artwork not being passed to system metadata.
Fixed inconsistent backgrounds in some areas.
Fixed globally scaled fonts overflowing their intended regions.
Simplified the top region of every list.
Improved animations in other library categories.
Improved and refined category features.
Improved liquid-glass effects for the mini player and navigation bar.
Improved Previous and Next handling that could mismatch audio and UI.
Unified entrance animations and removed the duplicate animation style.
Refined the About page and added Halcyon to open-source libraries.
Adjusted the locate button position.
Added Shuffle to the top menu.
Added the playback queue screen.
Added the recently added screen.
Added editable metadata fields with direct keyboard input.
Added long-press copying for song information in lists and the player.
Added current-track information to the top menu.
Added a performance setting for users who do not need liquid-glass effects.
Added update detection with an optional disable setting.
Added marquee lyrics to the mini player.
Improved lyric-screen animations.

string-array.name: update_developer_quotes
string-array.item: “永远快乐”这句话，不但渺茫得不能实现，并且荒谬得不能成立。快过的决不会永久；我们说永远快乐，正好像说四方的圆形、静止的动作，同样地自相矛盾。在高兴的时候，我们空对瞬息即逝的时间喊着说：“逗留一会儿吧！你太美了！”那有什么用？你要永久，你该向痛苦里去找。不讲别的，只要一个失眠的晚上，或者有约不来的下午，或者一课沉闷的听讲，这许多比一切宗教信仰更有效力，能使你尝到什么叫做“永生”的滋味。人生的刺就在这里：留恋着不肯快走的，偏是你所不留恋的东西。
为什么说擦屁股的最后一下，并不是你擦干净了，而是它的颜色淡到你能接受了？生活也是如此，差不多就行了。你越往里抠越多，其实人生和擦屁股一样，不是擦干净了，而是看淡了。所以尽力了就行，剩下的就交给内裤吧。
人对旧事物的怀念是无解的。或许你认为你已经释怀了，但是提起那个熟悉又陌生的名字时，还是会恍惚吧？她之所以那么难忘，是因为你和她之间是不完整的：那份最后没送出去的礼物，那些没说出口的话，以及脑海里幻想的以后。最要命的是那些没发生的场景，总在脑子里自动续写。可惜没有以后了，也不会再见面了。后来我才明白，原来有些告别不需要说再见，它早就藏在每一天熄灭又亮起的屏幕里，没说出口的话都成了过去。
我的心里下着一场不停歇的雨。看似平静的表面下，是潮湿、沉重的泥泞。我不是不想笑，只是所有的力气都用来支撑这个快要垮掉的自己。世界很吵闹，可我听到的只有空洞的回声。我努力地抓，却抓不住任何温暖的光。也许，我只是一个困在深海中的人，拼命地向上游，却早已忘记了岸的方向。
最近被一个叫微信支付的盯上了，太有手段了。我吃饭扣我钱，我喝奶茶扣我钱，我买皮肤也扣我钱，动不动就扣我钱。你很会做局呀，你很会阴我啊，成天藏在网络里，有本事咱们现实碰一碰。我这个人不怕事，也不来事儿，也不怕来事。小小的老子要是真发威了，你后悔就来不及了。再搞我钱包，我真要来事儿了，收手吧你。
自在极意豪，我有幸进入过。那是不可求的机遇，当我沉浸其中时，不会觉得有任何问题。直到某天，可能过了几天，也可能是十年、一辈子，你的思绪突然回到当时情景，以一种不自主的状态，被以前的自己击中。这时才明白，我追求一辈子的自在极意豪，原来一开始我就会了。此后我不再追求，不再刻意为之，只追寻内心的感觉，放任身体，发掘内心本来就存在的力量。
